description: Composition Brown round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic chest print Fitting Slim Wash Care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside-out in shaded Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Show the world that a fierce Spartan lies inside you with this brown tee from guerrilla. Team these with a pair of jeans or cargoes while hanging out with friends, going to the mall, the movies etc. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5'11 ft, Shoulders-18"
